THE PARTIES SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE ADDITIONAL BRIEFS TO PRO TEM JUDGE HUIBONHOA BY EMAIL ON THE SAME DATE AS FILING. NO TENTATIVE RULING WILL BE ISSUED. THE COURT WILL NOT PROVIDE A COURT REPORTER FOR THIS DISCOVERY HEARING. IF ANY PARTY WISHES A REPORTER, THE PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE ON A SINGLE REPORTER. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE C. Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Compliance With Certain Topics In Pltf'S Subpoena For Personal Appearance Of Google, Inc.
Off Calendar Sep-26-2013 Continued To Oct-15-13 At 04:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: Plaintiff WYDE VOICE LLC'S Motion to Compel Compliance with Certain Topics in Plaintiff's Subpoena for Personal Appearance of Google, Inc.

A further hearing was held by telephone on September 25, 2013 at 11 a.m. Stephen Wald appeared for plaintiff and cross-defendant Wyde Voice LLC and plaintiff Free Conferencing Corporation. Johanna Calabria appeared for defendants and cross-complainants Global IP Solutions, Inc. and Google Inc. Counsel agreed that five issues remain from the underlying motions: (1) scope of call blocking documents; (2) due diligence documents; (3) confidentiality treatment of general ledger; (4) communications regarding contracts with third parties; (5) revenue sharing agreements. The Court orders the following briefing regarding these five remaining issues. The parties shall submit simultaneous opening briefs by October 8, 2013, not to exceed 10 pages each. The briefs shall identify the underlying discovery requests and motions that relate to each issue, as well as set forth each party's position and argument. The parties may submit limited supporting papers with their opening briefs, i.e., evidence needed to establish any claims of burdensomeness and recent, relevant meet and confer correspondence. In addition, Ms. Calabria shall attach Pro Tem Huibonhoa's prior order regarding these motions. The parties then shall submit simultaneous reply briefs by October 15, 2013, not to exceed 5 pages each. No supporting papers shall be submitted with the reply briefs. All briefs and papers shall be filed with the court and emailed to Pro Tem Huibonhoa [email address provided to parties]. Matter continued to OCT-15-2013 for submission of reply briefs. No appearances required. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
